text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
HBD, Palmer! It's your day, bestie, so let's go
full-on party mode! Wahey!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wahey! TY, Helios! We'll get this party raging for
suuure!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Oh, wait—does the Mejiro fam do b-day parties?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I bet they're next-level insane! Crazy bougie,
right? Like, so lux and extra!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I don't know about bougie, but yeah, they're
throwing me a little celebration.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Omg, what if we throw a mega hype night
ourselves though?! Full send with ALL the Mejiros!
Woo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That actually sounds so fun! Not gonna lie,
though, my grandmother might be a little shook!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But, hey, I'm totally down 'cause I wanna
introduce you to everyone! Come hang with the
Mejiros!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Awww, Palmeeer! You're seriously my ride or die!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I'm so down! This party 'bout to pop off! I'm
talking ALL the hype! Wahey!
